name: Security Guard Cabin
description:
The SAMAN security guard cabin is our entry-tier, ready-stock 6′×6′×9′ steel-and-wood guard post at ₹75,000 — the size most facility managers actually order for a single full-time guard at a factory gate, office-park entrance, or housing-society checkpoint. This page covers the full specification, colour options, and ordering details for this specific SKU (SP-CC-40-2024). If you are still deciding between the four variants in our security cabin range, our security cabin range overview compares all four side by side.

The 6×6×9 ft cabin in white factory finish at a corporate office-park entrance — the most-ordered colour for this context.

Specifications at a Glance

Every figure below applies to the standard 6′×6′×9′ steel-and-wood configuration at ₹75,000. Add-ons (CCTV bracket, AC sleeve, custom colour) and bulk multi-unit orders are quoted separately at the order stage.

Attribute Value
Size (imperial) 6 ft × 6 ft × 9 ft
Size (metric) 1.83 m × 1.83 m × 2.74 m
Usable interior floor area ~2.7 sq m / ~29 sq ft
SKU SP-CC-40-2024
Frame MS (mild steel) perimeter base + corner posts
Wall infill Wood panel, factory-painted exterior
Roof MS frame with corrugated GI sheet, 5° rear-shed slope
Floor Cement fiber board on MS sub-frame
Door Single steel hinged, with internal latch
Window One sliding observation window, barred option available
Standard electrical 1 ceiling light point, 1 fan point, 1 wall socket (5A/15A)
Colour options 8 standard factory finishes
Price ₹75,000 (MRP ₹85,000)
Lead time from Bangalore stock 3 working days within 200 km radius

Inside the 6×6 ft Footprint: What Actually Fits

The 1.83 m × 1.83 m interior is large enough for one guard to work a full shift without the cramped feeling that smaller 4×4 or 4×6 cabins create. The usable floor plan accommodates a standard guard chair with a 600 mm seat, a 600 mm wall-mounted counter for the visitor register and pen tray, and roughly 450 mm of walking clearance from the chair to the door — enough to stand up, turn, and reach the door handle without obstruction.

Inside the 1.83 m × 1.83 m floor plan — chair, 600 mm register counter, and 450 mm walking clearance to the door.

The 9 ft (2.74 m) ceiling height adds two practical benefits beyond what shorter security post cabins offer. First, it provides clear blade clearance for a ceiling fan above the guard's head. Second, the extra air volume keeps the cabin tolerable through afternoon shifts in Indian summer conditions when the ventilator opening alone is doing the cooling work. Guards up to 6 ft tall have no head clearance issues under the standard LED tube light.

Steel Frame and Wood Panel Construction: What This Build Means

The build for this SKU is the standard Indian entry-tier guard-cabin construction. An MS (mild steel) frame carries the structural load, and pre-finished wood panels infill the walls. The base is an MS perimeter member welded into a rigid rectangle, with vertical MS posts at each corner. Cement fiber board sits on the MS sub-frame as the floor. The roof is an MS frame skinned with corrugated GI sheet, set on a 5-degree slope so monsoon water sheds clear toward the rear.

Standard Indian entry-tier construction — MS steel frame, factory-painted wood panel infill, corrugated GI roof with rear slope.

Wood panel infill, factory-painted with industrial-grade exterior coating, was selected for this entry-tier SKU for three reasons. It keeps the cabin light enough to lift onto its pad without a crane. It shortens factory fit-out time, which is part of how the 3-day dispatch window stays consistent. And it holds the price at ₹75,000 — below the PUF-panel and FRP-shell alternatives. For PUF or FRP construction options across the cluster, our full security cabin lineup covers the material trade-offs.

Design Choices: 8 Colour Finishes Available on This Model

The 6×6 cabin ships in eight factory-painted colour finishes chosen to match common Indian gate contexts. Colour choice generally tracks the gate type.

White and beige tend to suit apartment-society and corporate-office gates where the cabin should blend with compound walls and existing security architecture. Dark grey, black, and green are the most-ordered factory and industrial-site finishes — they hide dust, grease marks, and exhaust soiling between cleaning intervals. Orange and purple are usually specified by security-firm clients who maintain brand colours across their checkpoint cabins, and by event-venue operators who want the cabin visible from a distance as part of the wayfinding.

All 8 standard factory finishes — pick by gate context (white/beige for societies, dark grey/black/green for factories, orange/purple for security firms).

The paint is applied at the factory using a standard industrial coating system and is rated for four years of outdoor wear before repainting becomes advisable. Custom colour matching against a specific RAL code or paint sample is available on bulk orders of five units or more, adding 5–7 working days to the standard dispatch window.

When to Choose This Guard Cabin Over the Other 3 in Our Security Range

Four security cabins sit in our range at four price points. Pick this 6′×6′×9′ steel-and-wood unit when you need a single cabin for a fixed gate position that will not move for the lifetime of the deployment, ₹75,000 is the budget you have set for the cabin itself, and your site is within 3-day reach of our Bangalore facility or you can wait 7–21 days for dispatch from our Greater Noida unit.

Variant Price Pick it when
This SKU — Security Guard Cabin ₹75,000 Single full-time guard at a fixed gate; steel + wood entry standard
Portable variant ₹85,000 The cabin will move between sites or guard posts as your project progresses
Readymade variant ₹95,000 You need a unit dispatched the same week, with no specification choices to make
Prefabricated variant ₹1,05,000 You want PUF-panel insulation, factory-finished premium build, and the strongest summer-heat performance

To compare the relocatable version of this cabin, the no-spec-choice ready-stock model, or the PUF-insulated premium variant, follow the links above.

Ordering This Specific Unit: Price, Stock, Lead Time

The ₹75,000 price covers the standard 6′×6′×9′ steel-and-wood cabin in any of the eight standard colours, with the standard electrical fitout (one light point, one fan point, one 5A/15A wall socket) and standard hardware (steel hinged door and one sliding observation window). Site delivery within 200 km of our Bangalore facility is included; sites beyond that radius are quoted with a transport line item.

What sits outside the ₹75,000 base price: a CCTV camera mounting bracket with wiring conduit, an AC sleeve cutout (factory pre-fit only), an internal partition for a separate locker space, and custom paint matching outside the 8 standard colours. These are confirmed at the order stage and added to the invoice line by line.

Ready-stock dispatch from our Bangalore yard — 3 working days within 200 km, 7–21 days nationwide.

Stock dispatches from our Bangalore unit within 3 working days for sites across Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and southern Andhra Pradesh. Sites in north and east India dispatch from our Greater Noida facility within 7–21 working days. For multi-unit campus orders or specification guidance across the cluster, our wider security cabin range covers buyer guidance for bulk requirements.

Frequently Asked About the 6×6×9 ft Model

Will a guard's chair and register desk fit inside the 6×6 ft floor area?

Yes. The internal usable floor area is 1.83 m × 1.83 m (~29 sq ft), which accommodates a standard guard chair with a 600 mm seat, a 600 mm wall-mounted register counter, and approximately 450 mm of walking clearance to the door. Larger furniture — a full office desk or filing cabinet — does not fit comfortably and is not recommended at this size; for a workspace cabin instead of a guard post, see our office workspace cabin.

Why is this cabin 9 ft tall when other small cabins are 7 or 8 ft?

The 9 ft (2.74 m) ceiling adds two practical benefits. It provides clear blade clearance for a ceiling fan above the guard's head, and the extra air volume keeps the cabin tolerable through Indian summer afternoons without an AC. Shorter cabins save material cost but trap heat faster, particularly between 1pm and 4pm in outdoor deployments. This is one reason facility managers keep specifying the 6×6×9 ft format over lower-ceiling alternatives.

The price says ₹75,000 — does that include delivery and installation?

Delivery to sites within 200 km of our Bangalore facility is included in the ₹75,000 price. Installation — placing the unit on a prepared pad and connecting it to your mains supply at the existing switchboard — is also included for in-radius sites. Beyond 200 km, transport is quoted separately as a line item. Multi-unit orders are priced and quoted together at order stage.

Can I order this 6×6×9 ft unit in a colour not shown in the 8 standard options?

Yes, on orders of five units or more. Custom paint matching against a specific RAL code or paint sample is applied at the factory before dispatch and adds 5–7 working days to the standard lead time. For single-unit orders, we recommend choosing from the 8 standard colours to keep the 3-day Bangalore-stock dispatch window.

How does the steel-and-wood build compare to the PUF-panel construction in your premium variant?

Steel-and-wood (this unit) is lighter, cheaper to manufacture, and the standard construction for entry-tier Indian guard cabins. PUF-panel construction in the PUF-insulated premium variant adds insulated polyurethane foam between two GI sheets, giving better summer heat performance and tighter sound insulation, at a ₹30,000 step-up over this SKU. If your post is outdoors with afternoon temperatures consistently above 38°C, the PUF unit pays back in guard comfort. For standard urban and industrial deployments, the steel-and-wood build is what most buyers actually order.

Get the security guard cabin in eight colours at ₹75,000 from our Bangalore stock — 3 working days within 200 km, or 7–21 days nationwide from our Greater Noida unit. Call or WhatsApp +91 97089 89937 for stock confirmation and dispatch dates.
short_description:
Ready-stock 6′×6′×9′ guard post — factory-built in steel and wood for single full-time guard at factory, office-park or housing-society gates.
Size
6×6×9 ft (1.83m)
Capacity
1 guard, full shift
Frame
MS steel perimeter
Panel
Wood, factory painted
Price
₹75,000 (MRP ₹85k)
Delivery
3 days from BLR stock
Floor Load
100 kg/m² standard
Relocations
Static install design
From Bangalore + Greater Noida
3-day delivery within 200 km
